'''waduhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylol|xylol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylol|xylol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| waduhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædihith|wædihith]] || [[word:wædihij|wædihij]] || [[word:wædihish|wædihish]] || [[word:wædihi|wædihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:waduduhuth|waduduhuth]] || [[word:waduduhuj|waduduhuj]] || [[word:waduduhush|waduduhush]] || [[word:waduduhu|waduduhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:waduhuth|waduhuth]] || [[word:waduhuj|waduhuj]] || [[word:waduhush|waduhush]] || [[word:waduhu|waduhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadufhuth|wadufhuth]] || [[word:wadufhuj|wadufhuj]] || [[word:wadufhush|wadufhush]] || [[word:wadufhuf|wadufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:waduhuthu|waduhuthu]] || [[word:waduhuju|waduhuju]] || [[word:waduhushu|waduhushu]] || [[word:waduhuku|waduhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:waduhuth|waduhuth]] || [[word:waduhuj|waduhuj]] || [[word:waduhush|waduhush]] || [[word:waduhu|waduhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:waduhuthul|waduhuthul]] || [[word:waduhujul|waduhujul]] || [[word:waduhushul|waduhushul]] || [[word:waduhukul|waduhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:waduhuthuthu|waduhuthuthu]] || [[word:waduhujuju|waduhujuju]] || [[word:waduhushushu|waduhushushu]] || [[word:waduhuku|waduhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:waduhuthun|waduhuthun]] || [[word:waduhujun|waduhujun]] || [[word:waduhushun|waduhushun]] || [[word:waduhukun|waduhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:waduhuthuoro|waduhuthuoro]] || [[word:waduhujuoro|waduhujuoro]] || [[word:waduhushuoro|waduhushuoro]] || [[word:waduhukuoro|waduhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
